steps.title: Define the pattern described
steps.content: The passage says archaeologists have found many Tritia gibbosula shell beads at many Middle Stone Age sites across western North Africa. The blank must describe that widespread presence.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong meanings
steps.content: Choice A means convenience or practicality, which is not the focus. Choice B means fertility or productive abundance, not wide distribution. Choice D means diversity, but the passage emphasizes similar beads appearing at many sites.

steps.title: Choose widespread presence
steps.content: The remaining word means being found everywhere or in many places, which matches the beads' presence across many sites. The answer is C.
